mappings.rationaleAI: REM/NREM stages address sleep state (D.3), defining criteria (D.3.a), and psychophysiological variations (D.3.b).

Diet and nutrition address food functions (D.1.a) and feeding behaviour (D.1.d).
Human ageing addresses aging (A.6) and dying/death (A.7).

Covers the expanding role of anaesthetists in obstetric care — the only defensible candidate for birth as a stage in the human life cycle (unresolved leaf A.3).
Covers neurodegenerative conditions, risk factors, and aging populations — directly relevant to aging as a life cycle stage.
